untranslatable_reason: This signal requires real-time options market data (ITM/OTM status, option series expiration dates, spread legs, and strike prices) which are not available in the allowed price/technical indicators. The rule operates on derivatives pricing and optionality conditions that cannot be expressed using only OHLCV and technical analysis indicators.
translation_notes: MCMILLAN_DRY_148 is an options spread management rule requiring: (1) monitoring whether puts OR calls are slightly ITM, (2) tracking near-term expiration timing, (3) ability to close specific legs of a spread position. These require options chain data, strike prices, and Greeks—all outside the scope of the technical indicator library. This signal is backtest-compatible only with an options-enabled engine that tracks spread positions and Greeks.
